parameters.query:
WITH target_record AS (
    -- 第一步：锁定唯一的一条历史清单记录
    -- 解决了 "6条数据重复" 的问题
    SELECT 
        procedure_list_id,
        product_model_id,
        -- 将 text/json 类型的字段转为 jsonb 方便处理
        procedure_detail_id::jsonb AS p_full_json,
        history_procedure_detail_id::jsonb AS h_full_json
    FROM 
        mes.history_procedure_list
    WHERE 
        procedure_list_id = {{ $json.body.procedure_list_id }}
        AND status = 1  -- 表定义是 int4，所以这里用数字 1
    ORDER BY 
        createtime DESC 
    LIMIT 1
),
zipped_list AS (
    -- 第二步：将两个数组“拉链式”缝合
    -- 解决了 "只能查最新数据，无法还原历史版本" 的问题
    SELECT 
        t.procedure_list_id,
        t.product_model_id,
        p_elem.value::int AS procedure_detail_id,
        h_elem.value::bigint AS history_procedure_id, -- 表定义是 int8，这里转 bigint
        p_elem.ordinality AS order_num
    FROM 
        target_record t,
        -- 提取 procedure_detail_id 数组并展开，生成序号
        jsonb_array_elements_text(t.p_full_json -> 'procedure_detail_id') WITH ORDINALITY AS p_elem(value, ordinality)
    JOIN 
        -- 提取 history_procedure_detail_id 数组并展开，生成序号
        jsonb_array_elements_text(t.h_full_json -> 'history_procedure_detail_id') WITH ORDINALITY AS h_elem(value, ordinality)
        -- *** 核心：通过序号相等 (index相同) 进行匹配 ***
        ON p_elem.ordinality = h_elem.ordinality
)
SELECT
    list.procedure_list_id,
    m.product_model_name,
    pd.procedure_detail_id,
    pd.procedure_name,
    pd.current_version,
    pd.common_proocedure,
    
    -- 具体的历史快照 ID
    hpd.history_procedure_id,
    
    -- 从历史详情表中读取当时的参数
    hpd.checkrule,
    hpd.procedure_dataupload,
    hpd.procedure_scheduling,
    
    -- 【转换逻辑】解决了 "column does not exist" 报错
    -- 根据 int4 类型的值，手动转换为中文描述
    CASE hpd.procedure_scheduling
        WHEN 0 THEN '未知'
        WHEN 2 THEN '组装测试'
        WHEN 3 THEN '成品测试'
        ELSE '其他'
    END AS scheduling_description,
    
    -- 【转换逻辑】前端需要的布尔值
    CASE 
        WHEN hpd.procedure_dataupload = 2 THEN true 
        ELSE false 
    END as procedure_dataupload_bool

FROM 
    zipped_list list
-- 关联数据模型表
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.product_model m ON list.product_model_id = m.product_model_id
-- 关联工序主表（获取工序名称等通用信息）
JOIN 
    mes.procedure_detail pd ON list.procedure_detail_id = pd.procedure_detail_id
-- 关联历史详情表（获取当时保存的 checkrule, scheduling 等特定参数）
JOIN 
    mes.history_procedure_detail hpd ON list.history_procedure_id = hpd.history_procedure_id

ORDER BY
    list.order_num;
